phase15: eight typed state domain families: categorical, ordered, continuous, vector/manifold, relational, set, process, probabilistic
content-addressed typed runtime StateValue occurrences distinct from ontology/schema identity
role-explicit relational state signatures and role-to-participant bindings
typed probabilistic distributions over typed StateValue support
unit/frame/manifold-safe state algebra with fail-closed undefined transforms
semantic-role-addressed transition mechanisms with preconditions, defeaters, branches and secondary events
explicit per-use TRANSITION authority distinct from lifecycle and competence
bounded tri-valued capability dependency DAG with exact state/capability leaves
rich durable StateAssignment value documents with content-identity verification
phase16: structural causal variables and exact causal mechanism graph
bounded propagation with causal depth, temporal horizon, proof/event/delta/branch budgets
absolute stochastic branch probability and explicit unresolved probability mass
structural do-interventions with incoming-edge cuts plus imposed-state causal root propagation
counterfactual abduction -> isolated context -> exogenous restoration -> intervention -> prediction
branch-to-proof exact identity and reusable causal proof DAG
directional why/cause-of, effect-of, what-if and why-not causal query semantics
causal explanation Response CSIR family with exact cause/effect semantic ports
proof-derived causal learning evidence and intervention/mechanism-gated candidate research
impact vectors separating physical, affective, reported-affect and stance channels
probability-weighted expected goal pressure excluding unresolved/nonactual branches by default
causal planning under exact per-action PLAN authority and exact utility-policy authority
planning remains pre-authorization and cannot perform external effects
deterministic Stage-0 projection of already-promoted state/causal operational authority

fixed state semantic identity being evidence-sensitive

fixed relational state relying on participant tuple position rather than semantic roles
fixed probabilistic support being opaque labels instead of typed state values
fixed multiple active state assignments being resolved by arbitrary record order
fixed same-variable intermediate causal deltas being committed as simultaneous active current state
fixed final CLEAR semantics to invalidate prior state without fabricating replacement
fixed stochastic pruning/partial branches losing unresolved probability mass
fixed branch-count, confidence, proof-step, causal-depth and time-horizon accounting
fixed state-triggered causal propagation collapsing stochastic branches
fixed intervention edge cuts being treated as uncertainty and interventions not propagating downstream
fixed intervention cut identity being time-specific instead of structural-variable-specific
fixed context isolation leaking unrelated hypothetical/session worlds
fixed counterfactual exogenous assumptions being opaque/unapplied
fixed unknown possible defeaters under BLOCK being treated as absent
fixed competing mechanisms having implicit execution-order overwrite semantics
added exact aggregation-selection authority hook that may only select among already proof-bearing distributions
fixed invalidated/historical rich authority revisions being eligible for runtime selection
fixed active lifecycle being mistaken for executable causal use authority
fixed Stage-13 trusting Stage-12 causal artifacts without independently revalidating cycle-pinned TRANSITION use
fixed actual-context commit accepting a mismatched simulation/delta context
fixed durable state consequence retaining only opaque proof refs instead of exact causal proof DAG persistence
fixed effect_of directionality and why_not contrast-proof selection
fixed causal queries falling back to wrong simulation context or accepting unresolved proof branches
fixed unanswered causal results carrying a definitive explanation object
fixed impact/goal calculus dropping branch probability or converting unresolved/nonactual impact into ordinary goals
fixed capability holder discovery using wrong type assertion revision field and tri-valued confidence composition
fixed EXOGENOUS mechanism trigger being declared but unreachable
fixed mechanism role/dependency closure gaps
fixed per-action PLAN authority and exact utility-policy authority not being independently enforced
fixed Stage-0 state/causal authority projection mixing generations under concurrent authority change
fixed package import closure error from misplaced authority_projection_v351 export

run replay, concurrency, performance and budget exhaustion validation
